title: Pipeline Hardening & Scraping Infrastructure
commits: ae3dfab: feat(config): add startup validation for required env vars
8ef93c8: chore(deps): pin all dependencies and add fastapi/apscheduler/pydantic
425eaf4: feat(schema): widen url columns to VARCHAR(2048)
cb76403: feat(schema): remove redundant url column from html_content, add UNIQUE(url_id)
f250bd7: feat(schema): add UNIQUE(title, url) and INDEX(timestamp) to publications
51a253f: feat(schema): add secondary indexes to researchers, authorship, html_content
5f325d7: feat(schema): add scrape_log table
66658cd: feat(schema): add NOT NULL constraints on foreign keys
2a79daf: fix(researcher): remove RETURNING clause and add missing page_type param
634596f: fix(html_fetcher): return bool from fetch_and_save_if_changed, parse HTML once
b05fb76: feat(security): add SSRF protection with URL validation
df84dc1: feat(scraping): add per-domain rate limiting and exponential backoff
67ebb79: feat(scraping): add content size limit (1 MB) and configurable truncation
e4ff99d: feat(scraping): add robots.txt compliance
318ad68: fix(publication): instantiate OpenAI client once, use configurable model
c102423: feat(publication): add Pydantic validation for LLM output
fcd9399: feat(publication): add deduplication before insert
c2a72e6: feat(scraping): add diff-based extraction with get_previous_text and compute_diff
d411953: feat(scheduler): create run_scrape_job with threading lock and scrape_log
a10afd3: feat(scheduler): add APScheduler BackgroundScheduler with start/shutdown
